text.autoconfig.mob_better_config.title: Mob Better Config
text.autoconfig.mob_better_config.option: Chance for skeletons to summon reinforcements when damaged.
Distance at which it detects targets.
If true, burns in sunlight like normal zombies.
Number of Zombie Villagers spawned per natural spawn. Keep low to avoid lag.
Chance to spawn with random armor.
Chance to call reinforcements when damaged.
Controls curing speed. 1.0 = normal, >1 faster, <1 slower.
Allows the Witch to throw potions more frequently.
Multiplies damage dealt by thrown potions. 1.0 = normal.
Number of Witches spawned per natural spawn. Keep low to avoid lag.
Chance for Witch to summon reinforcements when damaged.
Multiplies the amount of items dropped by the Witch. 1.0 = normal.
Multiplies items dropped by Zombies. 1.0 = normal.
Multiplies items dropped by Skeletons. 1.0 = normal.
Multiplies items dropped by Zombie Villagers. 1.0 = normal.
Base maximum health of the Spider.
Base melee damage dealt by the Spider.
Distance at which Spider detects targets.
Makes the Spider immune to fire damage.
Number of Spiders spawned per natural spawn. Keep low to avoid lag.
Chance for Spider to spawn with random armor.
Chance for Spider to summon reinforcements when damaged.
Multiplies items dropped by Spider. 1.0 = normal.
Base maximum health of the Cave Spider.
Base melee damage dealt by the Cave Spider.
Makes the Cave Spider immune to fire damage.
Makes the Cave Spider glow permanently.
Number of Cave Spiders spawned per natural spawn. Keep low to avoid lag.
Chance for Cave Spider to summon reinforcements when damaged.
Multiplies items dropped by Cave Spider. 1.0 = normal.
If false, Cave Spider will not apply poison.
Size of the explosion. Vanilla is 3.
Multiplies explosion power. 1.0 = normal, 2.0 = double damage.
Time before explosion. 20 ticks = 1 second. Vanilla is 30.
If enabled, Creepers spawn in charged (blue aura) state.
Prevents Creeper from taking fire damage.
Number of Creepers spawned per natural spawn. Keep low to avoid lag.
Chance to summon another Creeper when damaged.
Base maximum health of the Warden. Vanilla: 500
How far targets are launched on melee hit. Vanilla: 1.5
Distance at which the Warden detects targets.
Cooldown between sonic boom uses. Vanilla: 200 ticks.
Delay after melee before sonic boom can trigger. Vanilla: 40 ticks.
If enabled, Warden applies Darkness periodically.
Radius around Warden where Darkness is applied. Vanilla: 20
How long Darkness lasts. Vanilla: 260 ticks.
How often Darkness is applied. Vanilla: 120 ticks.
Base anger increase when provoked. Vanilla: 35
Anger increase when hit by projectile. Vanilla: 10
Extra anger added when Warden takes damage. Vanilla: 20
Number of Wardens spawned per spawn event. Use carefully.
Chance to spawn another Warden when damaged.
If enabled, Warden ignores fire damage.
Base maximum health of the Vindicator.
Base axe damage dealt by the Vindicator.
Distance at which the Vindicator detects targets.
If enabled, Vindicator will attack all mobs like 'Johnny'.
Number of Vindicators spawned per natural spawn. Keep low to avoid lag.
Chance to summon extra Vindicators when damaged.
Base maximum health of the Stray.
Base melee damage dealt by the Stray.
Distance at which the Stray detects targets.
If enabled, arrows apply Slowness effect.
Duration of Slowness effect in ticks (20 ticks = 1 second).
Strength level of Slowness. 0 = Slowness I, 1 = Slowness II.
Number of Strays spawned per natural spawn. Keep low to avoid lag.
Chance to summon extra Strays when damaged.
If true, the Stray burns in sunlight like a normal Skeleton.
If enabled, the Stray can spawn wearing random armor pieces.
Chance for the Stray to spawn with armor. 0.15 = 15%.
Multiplies experience dropped by normal slimes. 1.0 = normal.
Forces slimes to spawn at this size. -1 = vanilla size behavior.
Maximum allowed slime size. Vanilla internal max is 127.
Base movement speed before size scaling. Vanilla: 0.2.
Additional movement speed added per slime size level.
If disabled, slimes will not split into smaller slimes when killed.
Multiplier applied to child slime size when splitting. Vanilla: 0.5.
Minimum number of child slimes created on split. Vanilla: 2.
Maximum number of child slimes created on split. Vanilla: 4.
Number of slimes spawned per natural spawn. Keep low to avoid lag.
If enabled, boss slimes will not split on death.
If enabled, slime damage increases based on its size.
Knockback applied to targets when slime attacks.
If enabled, slime ignores fire damage.
If enabled, slimes despawn when difficulty is set to Peaceful.
Enables boss variants for Pillagers. If disabled, no Pillager can become a Boss regardless of boss spawn chance.
If enabled, every spawned slime becomes a boss. Overrides boss spawn chance.
Chance for a slime to spawn as a boss when Boss Mode is enabled. 0.05 = 5%.
Multiplies maximum health for boss slimes.
Multiplies attack damage for boss slimes.
If enabled, boss slimes will glow to make them easier to identify.
If enabled, boss slimes display a red 'Boss' name tag.
Base maximum health of the Husk. Vanilla: 20
If enabled, Husk applies Hunger when attacking with empty hand.
Duration in ticks. 20 ticks = 1 second. Vanilla: 140
Strength level of Hunger. 0 = Hunger I.
If enabled, Husk becomes stronger in desert biomes.
Health value while in desert biome.
Multiplies attack damage in desert biome. 1.0 = normal.
Extra Husks spawned per natural spawn. Keep low to avoid lag.
Chance to summon extra Husks when damaged.
If enabled, Husk will not burn in sunlight.
If enabled, Husk converts into Zombie when submerged.
Time in ticks before conversion. Vanilla ~300 ticks.
Enables boss variants for husk. If disabled, no husk can become bosses regardless of spawn chance.
If enabled, every spawned Husk becomes a Boss. Overrides boss chance.
Chance for a Husk to spawn as Boss when Boss Mode is enabled. 0.05 = 5%.
Multiplies maximum health for Boss Husks.
Multiplies attack damage for Boss Husks.
If enabled, Boss Husks glow to make them easier to identify.
If enabled, Boss Husks display a custom red 'Boss' name tag.
Base maximum health of the Pillager. Vanilla: 24
Base melee damage dealt by the Pillager. Vanilla: 5
Distance at which the Pillager detects targets. Vanilla: 32
Multiplies damage dealt by crossbow shots. 1.0 = normal.
If enabled, Pillagers receive stat bonuses during raids.
Damage multiplier applied during raids. 1.0 = normal.
Health multiplier applied during raids. 1.0 = normal.
Number of Pillagers spawned per natural spawn. Keep low to avoid lag.
Chance for Pillager to summon reinforcements when damaged.
If enabled, Pillager ignores fire damage.
If enabled, every spawned Pillager becomes a Boss. Overrides boss chance.
Chance for a Pillager to spawn as Boss when Boss Mode is enabled. 0.05 = 5%.
Multiplies maximum health for Boss Pillagers.
Multiplies attack damage for Boss Pillagers.
If enabled, Boss Pillagers glow to make them easier to identify.
If enabled, Boss Pillagers display a custom red 'Boss' name tag.
Base maximum health of the Phantom. Vanilla: 20
Base melee damage dealt by the Phantom. Vanilla: 6
Distance at which the Phantom detects targets. Vanilla: 64
Forces Phantom to spawn at this size. -1 = vanilla scaling behavior.
Multiplies Phantom size on spawn. 1.0 = normal.
Number of Phantoms spawned per natural spawn event. Keep low to avoid lag.
Multiplies experience dropped by Phantom. 1.0 = normal.
Chance for Phantom to summon another Phantom when damaged.
If enabled, Phantom ignores fire damage.
If enabled, Phantom burns in daylight (not vanilla behavior).
Enables boss variants for Phantoms. If disabled, no Phantom can become a Boss regardless of spawn chance.
If enabled, every spawned Phantom becomes a Boss. Overrides boss spawn chance.
Chance for a Phantom to spawn as Boss when Boss Mode is enabled. 0.05 = 5%.
Multiplies maximum health for Boss Phantoms.
Multiplies attack damage for Boss Phantoms.
If enabled, Boss Phantoms glow to make them easier to identify.
If enabled, Boss Phantoms display a custom red 'Boss' name tag.
Multiplies the Phantom's circling movement speed before attacking. 1.0 = normal vanilla behavior.
Multiplies the Phantom's dive (swoop) attack speed. Vanilla approx: 1.5
If enabled, spiders will be able to break wooden doors.

Controls how fast spiders break doors.
0 = Disabled
1 = Very Slow
2 = Slow
3 = Vanilla Speed
4 = Fast
5 = Very Fast
If enabled, phantoms will be able to break wooden doors (requires custom AI).

Controls how fast phantoms break doors.
0 = Disabled
1 = Very Slow
2 = Slow
3 = Vanilla Speed
4 = Fast
5 = Very Fast
Sets the Enderman's maximum health. Vanilla: 40
Sets the Enderman's melee attack damage. Vanilla: 7
Distance at which the Enderman detects targets. Vanilla: 64
If enabled, Endermen can break wooden doors.

Controls how fast doors are broken.
1 = Very Slow
2 = Slow
3 = Vanilla Speed
4 = Fast
5 = Very Fast
If disabled, Endermen will not teleport.
Multiplies the chance to teleport. 1.0 = Vanilla behavior
If enabled, Endermen will attack players without being looked at.
If disabled, Endermen will not take damage from water.
If disabled, Endermen cannot pick up blocks.
Number of additional Endermen spawned per natural spawn.
Chance to spawn reinforcement Endermen when damaged.
Allows Endermen to spawn as bosses.
Forces every Enderman to spawn as a boss.
Chance for an Enderman to spawn as a boss.
Health multiplier applied to boss Endermen.
Damage multiplier applied to boss Endermen.
Displays a custom boss name above the Enderman.
Prevents Endermen from taking fire damage.
If enabled, Enderman burns in daylight (not vanilla behavior).
If enabled, Enderman will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Cave Spider will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Creeper will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Husk will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Phantom will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Pillager will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Skeleton will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Slime will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Spider will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Stray will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Vindicator will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Warden will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Witch will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
If enabled, Zombie Villager will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
How many seconds the Enderman burns when exposed to direct sunlight. 20 ticks = 1 second. Vanilla Zombies burn for about 8 seconds.
If enabled, Wither Skeleton will receive a random custom name using prefix and suffix.
Sets the base health of the Wither Skeleton. Vanilla: 20.0
Sets the base melee attack damage. Vanilla: 4.0
Sets how far the Wither Skeleton can detect and follow targets. Vanilla: 16.0
If enabled, attacks will apply the Wither effect to targets.
Duration of the Wither effect in ticks. Vanilla: 200 ticks (10 seconds).
Strength level of the Wither effect. 0 = Wither I.
If enabled, arrows shot by the Wither Skeleton will be on fire.
How long arrows burn targets in ticks. Vanilla: 100 ticks (5 seconds).
Multiplies the number of Wither Skeletons that spawn.
Chance for additional Wither Skeletons to spawn as reinforcements when attacked.
Multiplies the amount of experience dropped on death.
Multiplies the amount of loot dropped on death.
If enabled, some Wither Skeletons can spawn as boss variants.
If enabled, all Wither Skeletons will spawn as bosses.
Chance for a Wither Skeleton to spawn as a boss. Used if Force All Boss is disabled.
Multiplier applied to health when spawned as a boss.
Multiplier applied to damage when spawned as a boss.
If enabled, boss Wither Skeletons will glow.
If enabled, boss Wither Skeletons will have a special custom name.
Sets the base damage of arrows shot by Wither Skeletons. Vanilla approx: 5.0
Probability (0.0–1.0) that a Wither Skeleton spawns with random armor equipped. Vanilla default: 0.20
Allows Drowned to spawn with random custom names.
Sets the base maximum health of Drowned. Vanilla: 20.0
Chance (0.0–1.0) for a Drowned to spawn wearing random armor. Vanilla approx: 0.20
Sets the base melee attack damage of Drowned. Vanilla: 3.0
Sets the base movement speed of Drowned. Vanilla: 0.23
Detection range for targeting players. Vanilla: 35.0
Allows Drowned to break wooden doors.
Door breaking difficulty level. 0 = Disabled (Vanilla), 1 = Easy, 2 = Normal, 3 = Hard, 4–5 = Extreme.
Chance (0.0–1.0) for a Drowned to spawn holding a trident. Vanilla approx: 0.10
Chance (0.0–1.0) for a Drowned to spawn holding a fishing rod.
Chance (0.0–1.0) for a Drowned to spawn holding a nautilus shell.
If enabled, Drowned only spawn in water below sea level minus offset.
Number of blocks below sea level required for spawning. Default: 5
Allows Drowned to spawn during the day.
Controls how fast thrown tridents travel. Vanilla approx: 1.6
Controls projectile spread when throwing tridents. Vanilla approx: 14
Multiplier applied to trident damage dealt by Drowned.
Makes Drowned swim more aggressively toward targets.
Additional upward swimming acceleration when chasing players.
Number of additional Drowned spawned per natural spawn event.
Chance (0.0–1.0) to spawn another Drowned when damaged.
Multiplier applied to experience dropped on death.
Allows Drowned to spawn as boss variants.
If enabled, all Drowned spawn as bosses.
Chance (0.0–1.0) for a Drowned to spawn as a boss.
Multiplier applied to boss Drowned health.
Multiplier applied to boss Drowned attack damage.
Boss Drowned spawn with a special custom name.
Allows Magma Cube to spawn with a custom name.
Multiplies the Magma Cube's base health.
Multiplies the Magma Cube's attack damage.
Multiplies the experience dropped by the Magma Cube.
Multiplies the loot dropped by the Magma Cube.
Sets a fixed size for Magma Cubes. Use -1 for vanilla behavior.
Minimum allowed size for Magma Cubes.
Maximum allowed size for Magma Cubes.
Allows Magma Cubes to split when defeated.
Prevents boss Magma Cubes from splitting on death.
Multiplier applied to size when splitting. Vanilla: 0.5 (size / 2).
Minimum number of smaller Magma Cubes spawned on split. Vanilla: 2.
Maximum number of smaller Magma Cubes spawned on split. Vanilla: 4.
Base movement speed of the Magma Cube (before size scaling).
Additional movement speed added per size level.
If enabled, attack damage increases with size.
If enabled, Magma Cubes despawn in Peaceful difficulty.
Multiplies the number of Magma Cubes spawned.
Chance for additional Magma Cubes to spawn as reinforcements.
If enabled, Magma Cubes will have the glowing effect.
Enables boss mechanics for Magma Cubes.
Forces all Magma Cubes to spawn as bosses.

Sets the base health of the Blaze. Vanilla: 20.0

Multiplier applied to vertical movement while attacking.

Value Guide:
0.0 = No upward boost
1.0 = Slight lift
2.0 = Fast upward chase
3.0 = Aggressive vertical hunter
5.0 = Rocket mode

Multiplier applied to downward motion to slow falling.

Value Guide:
1.0 = Vanilla fall speed
0.6 = Slower fall (Vanilla Blaze default)
0.3 = Floaty
0.1 = Almost hovering
2.0 = Heavy falling
If enabled, Blaze takes damage while in water. Vanilla behavior: true
